properties.displayName: Service install for persistence — sc.exe / new service registry write
properties.description: Service install with binPath pointing to user-writeable path or LOLBin. Detects via process telemetry (sc.exe create) and registry (HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\* writes).
properties.query:
// EventID 4697 is "Service installed" — direct signal, no cmdline-regex needed.
union
    ( SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
        | where EventID == 4697
        | where SubjectUserName !endswith "$"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account = SubjectUserName,
                  Detail = strcat("ServiceName=", ServiceName, " | Image=", ServiceFileName) ),
    ( SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
        | where EventID == 4688
        | where Account !endswith "$"
        | where NewProcessName endswith "\sc.exe" and CommandLine has "create"
        | where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(\Users\|\AppData\|\ProgramData\|\Temp\)"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
                  Detail = strcat("4688 sc.exe create: ", CommandLine) )
| order by TimeGenerated desc
